# coralseed 1.2.0

![](reference/figures/coralseedtrace.png)

`coralseed` is a spatially explicit probabilistic model aims to quantify
the spatial footprint of coral larval re-seeding from restoration
progjects. The model is based on input from high-resolution
oceanographic models ([CONNIE](https://connie.csiro.au)) that tracking
individual particles through space and time. By parameterising larval
behaviour (competency, habitat specific substrate settlement
preferences, swimming behaviour) individual-based probability of
settlement can be modelled for 10⁵ - 10⁷ larvae. Individual-based
settlement probability an dispersal paths then overlaid onto
high-resolution habitat maps ([Allen Coral
Atlas](https://www.allencoralatlas.org)) to form a spatially-explicit
model of settlement following release of coral larvae.

`coralseed` aims to provide insight into key knowledge gaps in larval
restoration:

- Where do larvae settle following release?
- What is the spatial footprint of larval reseeding projects?
- what are the likely densities of settled corals?
- What densities of adult corals (~10cm size) are produced from
  reseeding and where are they located?

By varying initial model parameters (e.g. tidal currents, time of
release, larval competency, larval densities, location of release
sites), a simulation modelling approach can be used to quantify the
likely spatial footprint and expected settlement densities, allowing for
optimisation and upscaling of larval reseeding programs on the Great
Barrier Reef and elsewhere.

## Installation

`coralseed` can be installed on github

``` r
#install.packages("remotes")
install_github("marine-ecologist/coralseed")
```

Below is a base parameterisation of coralseed across a 6.95hr time
period (limit_time) with an exponential time-to-settlement model
parameterisation (competency.function) with a type I mortality curve
(simulate.mortality) applied to 10% of the population over a 24 hr
period (simulate.mortality.n) with an additive settlement function
(probability).

``` r
library(coralseed)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(tmap)

sf_use_s2(FALSE)

## 0. Load example datasets

lizard_benthic_map <- st_read("../data-aux/Lizard-20250314042923/Benthic-Map/benthic.geojson", quiet=TRUE)
lizard_reef_map <- st_read("../data-aux/Lizard-20250314042923/Geomorphic-Map/geomorphic.geojson", quiet=TRUE)
lizard_particles <- st_read("../data-aux/run_day_12036_lizard_del_14_1512_sim1_10K_10.json", quiet=TRUE)



## 1. simulate settlement probabilities from habitat maps
# `seascape_probability` takes coral atlas inputs and a data.frame of settlement
# probability (mean, se) to simulate probability of settlement in habitats surrounding the release area

lizard_seascape <- seascape_probability(reefoutline=lizard_reef_map, habitat=lizard_benthic_map)


## 2. seed particles from dispersal model and simulate competency
# `seed_particles` outputs summary statistics and a four panel diagnostic plot


lizard_particles <- seed_particles(input = "../data-aux/run_day_12036_lizard_del_14_1512_sim1_10K_10.json",
                                   zarr = FALSE,
                                   set.centre = TRUE,
                                   seascape = lizard_seascape,
                                   probability = "additive",
                                   limit.time = 12,
                                   competency.function = "exponential",
                                   crs = 20353,
                                   simulate.mortality = "typeIII",
                                   simulate.mortality.n = 0.1,
                                   return.plot = TRUE,
                                   return.summary = TRUE,
                                   silent = FALSE)
                                   
## 3. simulate settlement of particles
# `settle_particles` then applies probability across the seascape to simulate spatially
# explicit patterns of settlement across the seascape:


lizard_settlers <- settle_particles(lizard_particles,
                                    probability = "additive",
                                    return.plot=FALSE,
                                    silent = TRUE)

lizard_settlement_density <- settlement_density(lizard_settlers$points)


## 4. Map combined coralseed outputs
# `map_coralseed` visualises all outputs from the above three models



map_coralseed(seed_particles_input = lizard_particles,
              settle_particles_input = lizard_settlers,
              settlement_density_input = lizard_settlement_density,
              seascape_probability = lizard_seascape,
              restoration.plot = c(100,100),
              show.footprint = TRUE,
              show.tracks = TRUE,
              subsample = 1000,
              webGL = TRUE)
```

# Package index

## Particle simulation

- [`simulate_particles()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/simulate_particles.md)
  : Simulate Lagrangian particle trajectories from gridded flow fields
- [`seed_particles()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/seed_particles.md)
  : Seed particles
- [`particles_to_tracks()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/particles_to_tracks.md)
  : Particles to tracks

## Settlement and seascapes

- [`seascape_probability()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/seascape_probability.md)
  : Seascape Probability
- [`settle_particles()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/settle_particles.md)
  : Settle Particles
- [`simulate_mortality()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/simulate_mortality.md)
  : Simulate Mortality

## Visualisation and summaries

- [`ggplot_silent()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/ggplot_silent.md)
  : Silence ggplot warnings
- [`plot_draws()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/plot_draws.md)
  : plot draws
- [`plot_draws_median()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/plot_draws_median.md)
  : plot draws
- [`plot_particles()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/plot_particles.md)
  : Plot output from settle_particles
- [`plot_recom()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/plot_recom.md)
  : plot_recom: Visualize Ocean Currents and Wind from NetCDF Data
- [`plot_settlers()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/plot_settlers.md)
  : Plot output from settle_particles
- [`set_restoration_plot()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/set_restoration_plot.md)
  : Set restoration plot
- [`benthic_map`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/benthic_map.md)
  : benthic_map
- [`seascapecolors()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/extract_parallel.md)
  [`extract_parallel()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/extract_parallel.md)
  [`map_coralseed()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/extract_parallel.md)
  : Color palettes
- [`lizard_osm_map`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/lizard_osm_map.md)
  : Lizard Island OSM basemap
- [`reef_map`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/reef_map.md)
  : reef_map
- [`settler_heatmap()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/settler_heatmap.md)
  : Generate a Heatmap of Settler Particles
- [`stationary_particles_map()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/stationary_particles_map.md)
  : Map stationary particles
- [`settlement_summary()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/settlement_summary.md)
  : Summarise settlement results
- [`settlement_density()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/settlement_density.md)
  : Settlement density

## Data

- [`lizard_osm_map`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/lizard_osm_map.md)
  : Lizard Island OSM basemap

## All functions

- [`animate_coralseed()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/animate_coralseed.md)
  : Animate Coral Seed Particle Tracks
- [`benthic_map`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/benthic_map.md)
  : benthic_map
- [`benthic_probability`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/benthic_probability.md)
  : benthic_probability
- [`calculate_dispersion()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/calculate_dispersion.md)
  : Calculate dispersion
- [`drop_stick()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/drop_stick.md)
  : Drop stuck particles
- [`extract_ocean_parcels()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/extract_ocean_parcels.md)
  : extract_ocean_particles
- [`seascapecolors()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/extract_parallel.md)
  [`extract_parallel()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/extract_parallel.md)
  [`map_coralseed()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/extract_parallel.md)
  : Color palettes
- [`flowchart_coralseed()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/flowchart_coralseed.md)
  : Flowchart of Coral Larval Fates
- [`ggplot_silent()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/ggplot_silent.md)
  : Silence ggplot warnings
- [`import_zarr()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/import_zarr.md)
  : Seed particles
- [`infamis_tiles_exp`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/infamis_tiles_exp.md)
  : A fitted brms model for tile-level settlement
- [`infamis_tiles_log`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/infamis_tiles_log.md)
  : Infamis tiles (lognormal model)
- [`infamis_tiles_weibull`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/infamis_tiles_weibull.md)
  : Infamis tiles (Weibull model)
- [`lizard_osm_map`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/lizard_osm_map.md)
  : Lizard Island OSM basemap
- [`metadata`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/metadata.md)
  : metadata
- [`parameter_draws_exp`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/parameter_draws_exp.md)
  : parameter_draws_exp
- [`parameter_draws_log`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/parameter_draws_log.md)
  : parameter_draws_log
- [`parameter_draws_weibull`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/parameter_draws_weibull.md)
  : parameter_draws_weibull
- [`particle_distances()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/particle_distances.md)
  : Particle distances
- [`particles_to_tracks()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/particles_to_tracks.md)
  : Particles to tracks
- [`particles_to_tracks_linestring()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/particles_to_tracks_linestring.md)
  : Particles to tracks
- [`particles_to_tracks_time()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/particles_to_tracks_time.md)
  : Particles to tracks v3.0
- [`plot_draws()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/plot_draws.md)
  : plot draws
- [`plot_draws_median()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/plot_draws_median.md)
  : plot draws
- [`plot_particles()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/plot_particles.md)
  : Plot output from settle_particles
- [`plot_recom()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/plot_recom.md)
  : plot_recom: Visualize Ocean Currents and Wind from NetCDF Data
- [`plot_settlers()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/plot_settlers.md)
  : Plot output from settle_particles
- [`predict_competency()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/predict_competency.md)
  : Predict competency
- [`process_year()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/process_year.md)
  : Process NetCDF rasters for a given year
- [`reef_map`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/reef_map.md)
  : reef_map
- [`render_vignettes()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/render_vignettes.md)
  : Render package Quarto vignettes one by one
- [`return_draws()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/return_draws.md)
  : return draws
- [`save2()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/save2.md)
  : Safely Save R Objects Without Overwriting the File
- [`seascape_color_pal()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/seascape_color_pal.md)
  : Seascape color palette
- [`seascape_probability()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/seascape_probability.md)
  : Seascape Probability
- [`seasims_tiles_exp`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/seasims_tiles_exp.md)
  : Seasims tiles (exponential model)
- [`seasims_tiles_log`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/seasims_tiles_log.md)
  : Seasims tiles (lognormal model)
- [`seasims_tiles_weibull`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/seasims_tiles_weibull.md)
  : Seasims tiles (Weibull model)
- [`seed_particles()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/seed_particles.md)
  : Seed particles
- [`seed_particles_dt()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/seed_particles_dt.md)
  : Seed particles
- [`set_buffer()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/set_buffer.md)
  : Set buffer
- [`set_restoration_plot()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/set_restoration_plot.md)
  : Set restoration plot
- [`settle_particles()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/settle_particles.md)
  : Settle Particles
- [`settlement_density()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/settlement_density.md)
  : Settlement density
- [`settlement_statistics()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/settlement_statistics.md)
  : Settlement statistics
- [`settlement_summary()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/settlement_summary.md)
  : Summarise settlement results
- [`settler_heatmap()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/settler_heatmap.md)
  : Generate a Heatmap of Settler Particles
- [`sf_to_xyzm()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/sf_to_xyzm.md)
  : Build LINESTRING XYZM trips (integer M from a time column)
- [`simulate_flowfields()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/simulate_flowfields.md)
  : Simulate interpolated flow fields from tiltmeter velocity data
- [`simulate_mortality()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/simulate_mortality.md)
  : Simulate Mortality
- [`simulate_particles()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/simulate_particles.md)
  : Simulate Lagrangian particle trajectories from gridded flow fields
- [`st_set_point()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/st_set_point.md)
  : st_set_point
- [`stationary_particles()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/stationary_particles.md)
  : Stationary particles
- [`stationary_particles_map()`](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/reference/stationary_particles_map.md)
  : Map stationary particles

# Articles

### Tutorials

- [End-to-end coralseed workflow: Lizard
  Island](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/01_lizard_end_to_end.md):
- [Build settlement-probability
  seascapes](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/02_seascape_probability.md):
- [Seed particles, competency, and
  mortality](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/03_particles_competency_mortality.md):
- [Settlement, density, and spatial
  summaries](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/04_settlement_density_summary.md):
- [Visualising coralseed
  outputs](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/05_visualisation_maps_animation.md):
- [Compare larval reseeding
  scenarios](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/06_scenario_comparison.md):
- [Tiltmeter-derived flow fields and particle
  simulations](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/07_tiltmeter_flow_particles.md):
- [Diagnostics, performance, and pkgdown
  rendering](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/08_diagnostics_performance_pkgdown.md):

- [2i. coralseed - Lizard Island (nGBR
  CONNIE)](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/scenario_lizard.md):
- [2ii. coralseed simulation - Lizard Island
  (nGBR)](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/coralseed_lizard.md):
- [3i. coralseed example Moore Reef (cGBR
  oceanparcels)](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/scenario_moore.md):
- [3ii. coralseed simulation - Moore Reef
  (nGBR)](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/coralseed_moore.md):

- [4i: reseed: interactive data
  tools](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/reseed.md):
- [4ii: reseed example: visualising coralseed
  output](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/reseed_lizard.md):
- [5: Particle dispersal
  simulation](https://marine-ecologist.github.io/coralseed/articles/langrangian.md):
